name: Heward's Handy Haversack
description: This backpack has a central pouch and two side pouches, each of which is an extradimensional space. Each side pouch can hold up to 200 pounds of material, not exceeding a volume of 25 cubic feet. The central pouch can hold up to 500 pounds of material, not exceeding a volume of 64 cubic feet.

retrieval.action: Utilize action or Bonus Action (your choice)
retrieval.feature: When reaching for specific item, it's always magically on top

destruction.conditions: If pouch is overloaded, pierced, torn, or haversack turned inside out
destruction.effect: If destroyed, contents lost forever (except Artifacts always return)

properties.air: Each pouch holds enough air for 10 minutes of breathing, divided by number of breathing creatures

extradimensional_interaction.effect: Placing haversack inside Bag of Holding, Portable Hole, or similar instantly destroys both items
extradimensional_interaction.gate_effect: Opens one-way gate to Astral Plane. Any creature within 10 feet not behind Total Cover is sucked through and deposited at random location. Gate closes and can't be reopened.
